articles.title: Mayor Wu remains firm as councilors consider rejecting her budget
articles.description:
Mayor Michelle Wu's budget proposal contains cuts that have angered some City Council members.

The post Mayor Wu remains firm as councilors consider rejecting her budget appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Mayor Michelle Wu's budget proposal faces potential rejection from City Council members.
Councilors express anger over proposed cuts affecting city services and programs.
Budget decisions could directly impact funding for local education and public safety.
